task_completion.description: Enable Agent Soundboards and Central Sound Control in Vicidial System Settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Vicidial Admin System Settings page showing 'Agent Soundboards' and 'Central Sound Control' options set to '1', 'Y', or enabled.

task_completion.description: Upload the legal_disclosure.wav audio file to the system
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Vicidial Audio Store or Audio Chooser page showing 'legal_disclosure' or 'legal_disclosure.wav' successfully uploaded and listed in the audio files.

task_completion.description: Create a new soundboard with the specified ID, name, and group
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Soundboards configuration page showing a new soundboard created with Soundboard ID 'LEGAL_SB', Soundboard Name 'Mandatory Compliance Disclosure', and User Group '---ALL---'.

task_completion.description: Include the uploaded audio file in the newly created soundboard
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Soundboard configuration or audio linking page showing the 'legal_disclosure' audio file added to the 'LEGAL_SB' soundboard's list of available audio files.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vicidial web interface to configure settings and upload audio
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the Vicidial admin web UI in a browser, not using curl, API scripts, or direct MySQL database queries in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the specific file requested from the correct path
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a file selection dialog or browser upload action interacting with the file at '/home/ga/Documents/legal_disclosure.wav', rather than creating a fake file elsewhere.

integrity.description: The settings and soundboard were genuinely configured in the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration screens should show standard Vicidial UI elements, success/save confirmation messages, or saved state in the actual application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The audio file to be uploaded is located at '/home/ga/Documents/legal_disclosure.wav'. The expected soundboard ID is 'LEGAL_SB'. The expected audio name in the system is 'legal_disclosure'. Point allocation: System settings (20 pts), Soundboard creation (30 pts), Audio upload (20 pts), Audio linked to soundboard (30 pts).
